name: atlas-shrugged
description: Ayn Rand's Atlas Shrugged — a monumental philosophical novel defending reason, individualism, capitalism, and the virtue of self-interest through the story of a strike by the men of the mind.
useCase: Understanding Objectivism, defending capitalism, the role of reason, individualism vs collectivism, personal responsibility, standing against the morality of sacrifice.
knownRisks: Rand's philosophy is controversial and rejected by many mainstream philosophers and economists
The novel's moral absolutism can be off-putting
Atlas Shrugged has been misinterpreted as endorsing greed — distinguish Rand's 'selfishness' from common selfishness
